title: MIF gene polymorphism - 5–8-CATT tetranucleotide repeat (rs5844572) at position -794 (-794*CATT5–8) and a single-nucleotide polymorphism (rs755622) at position -173 (-173*G/C)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"b7q6q","text":"This protocol provides a standardized methodolgy for a single-nucleotide polymorphism (SNP) at position -173 (-173*G/C) of the MIF gene. It also includes a standarized methodology to amplify a 207 bp (CATT5) segment of the MIF promoter region (MIF-794*CATT5-8 genotyping (rs5844572)) containing the microsatellite repeat sequence.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":205,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":256,"length":4}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Seema Chhabra
